description: Toy benchmark: same candidate pool for legacy vs hybrid. Labels are grades 0–2 (NDCG); binary relevant = grade >= 1.

results.title: Attention Is All You Need
results.snippet: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on encoder-decoder RNNs. We propose the Transformer based solely on attention mechanisms.

results.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers
results.snippet: We introduce BERT from unlabeled text by jointly conditioning on left and right context. Masked language model for NLP.

results.title: Nutrition of domestic cats and obesity trends
results.snippet: Feline diet survey across veterinary clinics. No relation to NLP or transformers.

results.title: Stock market volatility forecasting with ARIMA
results.snippet: Time series econometrics. Baseline ARIMA compared to GARCH for S&P returns.

results.title: Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models
results.snippet: We study empirical scaling laws for loss versus model size, dataset size, and compute for transformers.

results.title: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Networks
results.snippet: We trained a large deep CNN to classify 1.2M images. Convolutional nets for vision.

results.title: Longformer: The Long-Document Transformer
results.snippet: Transformer that scales linearly with sequence length for character modeling and encoding long documents.

results.title: Best chocolate chip cookie recipe
results.snippet: Butter, sugar, flour ratios for chewy cookies. Baking tips unrelated to machine translation.

queries.topic: dopamine synaptic plasticity nucleus accumbens reward learning

results.title: D1 receptor signaling modulates long-term potentiation in nucleus accumbens
results.snippet: Optogenetic stimulation of D1-MSNs paired with presynaptic activation induced LTP. Implications for reward-related learning.

results.title: Seasonal precipitation patterns in the Pacific Northwest
results.snippet: Climate variability and rainfall. No neuroscience content.

results.title: Phasic dopamine release encodes reward prediction errors
results.snippet: Voltammetry in behaving animals shows dopamine transients consistent with RPE models during appetitive conditioning.

results.title: Cryptocurrency market microstructure
results.snippet: Order book dynamics and high-frequency trading strategies.

results.title: Astrocyte regulation of synaptic glutamate during sleep
results.snippet: Gliotransmission and slow oscillations. Limited focus on dopamine or accumbens.

results.title: Spike-timing-dependent plasticity in mesolimbic dopamine pathways
results.snippet: STDP rules at glutamatergic synapses onto VTA dopamine neurons and accumbens projection neurons after reward pairing.
